MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Oct-16-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
Dennis Birkhimer, Esq. and Eric Wildegrube, Esq. for plaintiff Hanford-Freund & Co.
Daniel McLoughlin,Esq for Valerie Tashjian, Defendant (not present)
Mark Romeo, Esq. for Ralph Tashjian, Defendant

The parties reached a settlement after being sent to Judge Pro Tem Elliot Miles.

Terms of the settlement are as follows:

The defendants are to pay the sum of $125,000.00 to the plaintiff Hanford-Freund & Co.
$20,000.00 of said payment is due no later than 5:00pm on Friday November 11, 2006.

A balloon payment of the balance of $105.000.00 is due twelve months from September 18, 2007.
There are no prepayment penalties with simple interest.

The defendants shall enter into a joint escrow provided for payment of balance of proceeds of sale of property located at 317 Dorantes Ave. San Francisco, CA.

The defendants are to remain liable if the esrow is no sufficient to cover full payment.

Pursuant to CCP 664.6 the Court shall retain jurisdiction.

All parties waive any claims or causes of action that arise out of this matter.

With the exception of defendant Valerie Tashjian, all parties understand and agree to the terms of the settlement. Daniel McLoughlin, counsel for defendant Valerie Tashjian, affirms the settlemnt on behalf of his client.

Judge Pro Tem Elliot Miles; Clerks: J.I. Roque/R.Goulding; Court reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR # 1558

Hearing held. Tentative Ruling adopted and modified: Defendants' Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Set One is Granted as it is unopposed.
